---
title: "Decisions, decisions, decisions"
description: |
  Business requires you to make decisions, and decisions (not time) drives your
  business forwards. Here are some of my thoughts about how we related data
  science (decision science) to business decisions.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
bibliography: decisions-decisions-decisions.bib
---

# Decisions as a data team's north star

Decisions drive the business forward. In order to make good decisions, you'll 
need to use some evidence, i.e. qualitative or quantitative data. For those who
are still on the fence about using data, see 
[here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QqeOQ2-VotE)[@Colson_2019]
